productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Elite Black Sports Shoes
description: Step out and run in absolute style in the nike Zoom Elite men's running shoe that keeps the foot locked into place while delivering excellent breathability with large mesh panels along the upper. This shoe can be teamed with nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.UpperMesh upper for breathabilitySynthetic leather overlays for a stable, comfortable feelLace-up for snug FitNike swoosh logo on the sidesMidsoleNike Zoom phylon midsole for comfort OutsoleCarbon BRS 1000 outsole for maximum durabilityShoe CareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
